meaning: International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers 国际电气工人兄弟会
examples: "We were pretty much blindsided by that statement, " said Paul Feeney , spokesman for IBEW Local 2222 in Boston.
At Datatec Systems, we partnered with a nationwide IBEW workforce and got them to perform extraordinary feats of customer service.
At a rally in Boston today, IBEW Local 2222 President Ed Fitzpatrick said union members will not accept additional health care costs.
